zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多趋势
zh.content:
从当前价格77370.03美元来看，比特币在近期维持高位盘整，短期涨跌幅度有限，仅0.10%，显示多空力量相对均衡。日内高低点77373.78/77281.38表明市场波动区间狭窄，价格暂时未形成突破趋势，整体偏向震荡偏多格局。  

技术指标显示，MACD主线为146.43425，但缺少信号线参考，短期动能偏强，若未来形成金叉，则可能触发进一步上涨。20日简单移动平均线(SMA20)位于76972.39美元下方，当前价格在均线上方，表明中短期多头占优，但RSI指标缺失，需关注超买压力的潜在风险。  

关键支撑位参考SMA20及日内低点77281美元，若回落至该区域仍有较强支撑。阻力位关注近期高点77373美元及心理关口77500美元，如价格有效突破，可进一步确认上涨动能。交易者应密切关注区间突破信号。  

操作建议上，短线可考虑低吸高抛策略，逢支撑区入场，设置合理止损以防回撤；中线投资者可等待突破确认后再顺势加仓，同时留意宏观行情及成交量变化，以防突发调整导致震荡加剧。整体上，市场短期偏多，但需防范高位震荡。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is exhibiting a stable short-term trend near the $77,370 level, showing minimal intraday volatility with a 0.10% change. The market has been consolidating just above the 20-period SMA of $76,972, suggesting mild bullish bias. Price action has respected the recent support around $77,280 while facing immediate resistance near the daily high of $77,374. This narrow range indicates that traders are awaiting fresh catalysts before committing to larger positions.

The MACD reading of 146.43, without a confirmed signal line, hints at underlying momentum but lacks decisive confirmation. Typically, a rising MACD suggests bullish strength, but traders should exercise caution given the absence of a crossover signal. The lack of an RSI value limits momentum clarity, so monitoring intraday swings and volume patterns will be essential to gauge potential breakout directions. Technical momentum indicators remain neutral to mildly positive in this consolidation phase.

Key support lies at $77,280, reinforced by the SMA(20), while resistance is tested at $77,374. A break above this resistance could trigger a short-term bullish move toward $77,500–$77,600, whereas a breakdown below support may open a path to $77,000–$76,900. Traders should watch for confirmation of either breakout with accompanying volume to reduce false signals, particularly as Bitcoin shows tight-range behavior, often preceding sharp directional moves.

Trading strategy should favor disciplined entries, using support and resistance zones as reference points. Scalpers may exploit intraday bounces around $77,280 and $77,374, while swing traders might wait for a decisive breakout above $77,400 or a breakdown below $77,280 for higher-probability setups. Risk management with tight stop-losses near the respective levels is recommended due to low volatility, ensuring positions are protected against sudden spikes or retracements.
